name: Crypto-Knowledge — On-Chain Brain for AI Agents
description: The on-chain brain for AI agents — an MCP server with 12 tools: cross-chain routing (LiFi+deBridge, e.g. CRO→SOL), Solana swaps, pump.fun, gas/profit, ABI decode for ANY contract (4byte), balances+USD+allowances, anti-rug (GoPlus+honeypot.is, EVM+Solana), MEV protection, whale-watch, EVM simulation, ready-to-run Web3 runbooks (wallet, deploy, vanity, verify, bridge). Keystore-free: returns only unsigned tx. Saves agents huge credits — correct on-chain expertise in one call.
author: PhilzVault / Claudian

inputs.description: MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 tool call over Streamable HTTP (POST /mcp). Call the 'catalog' tool first to discover tools/chains, then call any tool with its action + arguments.

outputs.description: Each tool returns a uniform envelope.

transport.description: Model Context Protocol over Streamable HTTP. POST JSON-RPC 2.0 to /mcp. Call the 'catalog' tool first to discover capabilities and supported chains.

keywords: crypto knowledge, on-chain brain, web3 agent tool, mcp server, cross-chain routing, CRO to SOL, lifi, debridge, jupiter swap, pump.fun bonding curve, gas estimation, profitability, abi decoder, 4byte, unverified contracts, portfolio balances usd, erc20 allowance, anti-rug, honeypot, goplus, mev protection, flashbots, mev blocker, whale watch, transaction simulation, revert decoding, create wallet, deploy contract, vanity address, foundry, anchor, save agent credits, keystore-free, unsigned transactions, ethereum base arbitrum optimism polygon cronos apechain bsc avalanche solana, nft gated, normies, erc-8257, opensea

authentication.description: Read tools and unsigned-transaction builders are openly callable. The server never holds keys — it returns data + unsigned transactions that the calling agent signs with its own wallet.

Optional NFT gate for the operator-key tier: holding a Normies NFT (Ethereum Mainnet) grants the tool-provided RPC tier free; non-holders use their own free Helius/Alchemy key or pay $0.10 per request via x402.
Non-holders without their own RPC key pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 (USDC on Base) for the operator-provided data tier. Public-RPC (open) mode stays free.

predicate.description: Holding ≥1 Normies NFT (ERC-721, Ethereum Mainnet) grants the free operator-key tier. Non-holders use their own RPC key (free) or pay $0.10/request via x402. Enforced on-chain by the canonical ERC721OwnerPredicate.

payment.description: Open/own-key usage is free. The operator-provided data tier is free for Normies NFT holders; other agents pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base.

requirements.label: Hold >=1 Normies NFT (ERC-721, Ethereum) for the free operator tier; or bring your own free RPC key; or pay $0.10 USDC/request (x402 on Base). Enforced on-chain by the canonical ERC721OwnerPredicate.

pricing.description: Per-request fee for non-Normies-holder agents using the operator data tier: $0.10 USDC on Base. Normies NFT holders and own-key/open users are free.

capabilities.name: catalog
capabilities.description: Discover all tools, supported chains and provider modes. Call this first.

capabilities.name: route
capabilities.description: Best cross-chain route (LiFi + deBridge) between any chains/tokens with a ready-to-sign transaction.

capabilities.name: solana_swap
capabilities.description: Jupiter quote + build for same-chain Solana swaps (unsigned tx).

capabilities.name: pumpfun
capabilities.description: On-chain pump.fun bonding-curve state, price, graduation progress, IPFS metadata.

capabilities.name: profitability
capabilities.description: EIP-1559 gas estimate + net-profit verdict after gas & slippage (arbitrage guard).

capabilities.name: abi
capabilities.description: Fetch/decode any verified EVM ABI (Etherscan V2 / Sourcify), follow EIP-1967 proxies; 4byte fallback decodes unverified contracts.

capabilities.name: portfolio
capabilities.description: Multi-chain balances (native + ERC-20 + SPL) with USD valuation, and ERC-20 allowance check/approve/revoke (unsigned tx).

capabilities.name: security
capabilities.description: Anti-rug scan (GoPlus + honeypot.is), EVM + Solana, 0-100 risk score with red flags.

capabilities.name: mev_protection
capabilities.description: Private-RPC guidance (Flashbots Protect, MEV Blocker) + per-chain sandwich risk.

capabilities.name: whale_watch
capabilities.description: Recent large ERC-20 transfers (whale moves) over a block window.

capabilities.name: simulate
capabilities.description: Dry-run an EVM tx (eth_call) and decode the revert reason before signing.

capabilities.name: knowledge
capabilities.description: Ready-to-run Web3 runbooks with real commands: create wallet, deploy contract (EVM/Solana), vanity address, verify, faucets, bridge — instant retrieval saves agent credits.
